tasks.instruction: Within indoor LED displays, compare the first two products with pixel pitch between 2.5 mm and 3.0 mm, then request a quote for the one with lower maximum power consumption per square meter using the name Jordan Lee and email jordan.lee@example.com.

tasks.instruction: In the careers section, apply online to an engineering position in Berlin that was posted within the last 30 days, submitting the form with the name Taylor Morgan, email taylor.morgan@example.com, city Berlin, and “Company website” as the referral source without uploading any files.
